text:
I want to diff this file between my local branch and master: `breeze/cypress/fixtures/interestApi/interestCalcCreated.json`

To see the differences between your local branch and master for that specific file, you can use this Git command:

```bash
git diff master -- breeze/cypress/fixtures/interestApi/interestCalcCreated.json
```

Or alternatively:

```bash
git diff master:breeze/cypress/fixtures/interestApi/interestCalcCreated.json breeze/cypress/fixtures/interestApi/interestCalcCreated.json
```

This will show you the changes made to that file compared to what's in the master branch.
